name: Electronic Gourmet's French Onion Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb Yellow Onions, thinly sliced (about 5 cups)
1/2 cup Dry White Wine or Vermouth
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the onions slowly with the butter and oil in a covered saucepan for 15 minutes.
2. Uncover, raise the heat to moderate, and stir in the salt and sugar. Cook for 30 to 40 minutes, stirring frequently until the onions have turned an even, deep golden brown.
3. Sprinkle in the flour and stir for 3 minutes.
4. Turn off the heat, then blend in the boiling liquid. You may use canned beef bouillon (same quantity) or an equal part of boiling water plus stock or bouillon.
5. Add the wine and season to taste. Simmer partially covered for 30 to 40 minutes or more, skimming occasionally until correctly seasoned.
6. Set aside uncovered until ready to serve, then reheat to simmer.
7. Just before serving, stir in the cognac. Pour into French onion soup bowls over the rounds of bread. Cover with cheese and bake at 350°F (175°C) until the cheese melts.
